items.title: Outcomes lets you set the bar for quality.
items.title_zh: 结果可让您设定质量标准。
items.description: Outcomes lets you set the bar for quality. You write a rubric, a separate grader checks the output, and the agent iterates until it gets there. Subscribe to webhooks to get notified when it's done.
items.description_zh: 结果可让您设定质量标准。您编写一个评分标准，一个单独的评分者检查输出，然后代理进行迭代，直到到达那里。订阅 webhooks 以在完成时收到通知。
